description:
Product Information:

Product category: chew toys

Material: TPR

Brand : PETRICH

Specifications: butterfly type, barbell type, ball type, frisbee type

The product is filled with sponge + pure water, no need to fill it with water, it can be directly put into the refrigerator to freeze, so that the dog can bite and relieve the discomfort of teething.
